reviews.comment:
Siempre faltan 5 para el peso, no hay sistema, no hay esto no hay aquello...
La cortesía de los empleados no alcanza para suplir las deficiencias...

(Translated by Google)
There's always a shortfall of 5 pounds, the system is broken, there's no this, no that... The employees' courtesy isn't enough to make up for the shortcomings...
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16851497882005814309/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNTb05MRjNRRRAB

reviews.comment:
Buena atencion por parte de los empleados  administrativos y buena atencion en la playa  . Lastima que los ignorante turno mañana de seguridad del aria administrativa no sabe que cuando uno entra con una persona con reduccion de movilidad con (  baston  )tiene que dejar pasar al acompañante para ayúdar a esa persona   pero despues todo bien por el aca

(Translated by Google)
Good service from the administrative staff and good service on the beach. It's a shame that the ignorant morning security guards in the administrative area don't know that when someone enters with a person with reduced mobility (using a cane), they have to let the companion go first to help that person. But otherwise, everything was fine here.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16851497882005814309/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURpXzZmODdRRRAB
